About.title: About Me
About.description: Computer Engineering graduate specializing in Frontend Development (React/Next.js) with Full-Stack experience. Skilled in translating Figma designs into responsive, production-ready websites. Experienced in delivering production-grade projects within the LINE Ecosystem. Having completed all coursework, I am available to start working full-time immediately.

hrManager.title: HR Manager Webpage
hrManager.shortDescription: A comprehensive HRM web application for managing employee directories, departments, and payroll structures.
hrManager.description:
[Overview]
A Human Resource Management (HRM) web application designed to simplify workforce and organizational structures for medium to large enterprises, supporting seamless real-time data handling.

[Key Features]
• Employee Directory: Centralized database to search, filter, and view employee profiles by department.
• CRUD Operations: Full capability to create, read, update, and delete employee, department, and position logs.
• Department Structure: Flexible hierarchy control panels to maintain robust data integrity.
• System Performance: High-speed interactions optimized for heavy data manipulation.

[Tech Stack & Implementation]
Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS on the frontend for a modern, rapid UI experience, securely integrated with a PostgreSQL database backend via RESTful APIs.

nomnoey.title: Nomnoey Webpage
nomnoey.shortDescription: A premium responsive restaurant landing page built to showcase menus and optimize online brand presence.
nomnoey.description:
[Overview]
A single-page landing website developed for "Nomnoey" restaurant and bakery, dedicated to showcasing their menu items, boosting brand online presence, and driving offline foot traffic.

[Key Features]
• Responsive Menu Display: Fully interactive food menu layouts that scale beautifully across mobile and desktop interfaces.
• Location & Contact Integration: Smooth embedded Google Maps components alongside clean contact form logic.
• Performance Optimized: Compressed high-fidelity assets to ensure rapid loading speeds and lower bounce rates.

[Tech Stack & Implementation]
Architected using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, focusing on a clean, appetite-inducing color palette and semantic HTML for strong SEO fundamentals.

ploclo.title: PLOCLO Management System
ploclo.shortDescription: A university management dashboard for handling student scores and analyzing overall academic quality.
ploclo.description:
[Overview]
A comprehensive University Management Dashboard developed to streamline academic data tracking, student grading processes, and educational outcome evaluations within the university ecosystem.

[Key Features]
• Student Score Management: A centralized module to record, calculate, and manage cumulative student grades and assignment scores across various courses.
• Student Quality Analytics: Visual data dashboards analyzing grade distributions and performance benchmarks to monitor and showcase overall student academic quality and potential.
• Academic Records Centralization: A robust structured database mapping student profiles, enrolled courses, and final transcripts securely.

[Tech Stack & Implementation]
Built with React and TypeScript on the frontend to deliver a highly interactive and responsive dashboard interface, paired with Prisma ORM to efficiently handle complex relational database queries.

nuHackathon.title: NU Hackathon & Pitching Competition
nuHackathon.description: Participated in the hackathon, collaborating within a 48-hour timeframe to design, develop, and pitch a specialized mobile application tailored for software testers, integrated with AI features to optimize automated reporting workflows.
